title: CaptchaVerifyZ
body:
# 🛡️ Advanced Server Security Through Smart Verification Protect your Minecraft server from automated attacks, bot invasions, and malicious connections with this comprehensive security solution. This powerful verification system creates an impenetrable barrier against unwanted intrusions while maintaining a smooth experience for legitimate players. ## ✨ Key Features **🔒 Bulletproof Security System** - Instant captcha verification upon player connection - Isolated verification environment preventing world interference - Time-limited challenges with configurable difficulty levels - Multi-attempt protection with automatic escalation **🎯 Seamless Player Experience** - Visual captcha display through interactive maps - Clean, customizable verification interface - Automatic restoration to original spawn location - No impact on server performance or gameplay **⚙️ Advanced Configuration Options** - Fully customizable captcha length and character sets - Adjustable time limits and attempt restrictions - Personalized welcome and kick messages - Extensive security and performance settings **🚀 Smart Void Management** - Players held in secure falling state during verification - Complete command blocking until verification completion - Spectator mode isolation preventing world interaction - Automatic cleanup and data management **📊 Administrative Control** - Real-time verification statistics and monitoring - Hot-reload configuration without server restart - Comprehensive permission system - Debug logging for troubleshooting ## 🎮 How It Works When players join your server, they're immediately transported to a secure verification zone where they cannot interact with your world or other players. A unique captcha code is generated and displayed both in chat and on an interactive map item. Players must enter the correct code within the specified time limit to gain full server access. Failed attempts are tracked and logged, with automatic kicks after reaching the maximum attempt threshold. The system remembers verified players across sessions, ensuring they won't be challenged repeatedly while maintaining security against new connections. ## 🛠️ Perfect For - **Public Servers** seeking protection from bot attacks - **Community Servers** wanting to maintain member quality - **Creative Servers** preventing griefing from disposable accounts - **Survival Servers** blocking automated resource farming - **Any Server** prioritizing security without sacrificing user experience ## 📋 Technical Requirements - **Minecraft Version:** 1.20 - **Server Software:** Bukkit, Spigot, Paper compatible - ## 🔧 Installation & Setup 1. Download and place the plugin in your server's `plugins` folder 2. Restart your server to generate configuration files 3. Customize settings in `config.yml` to match your server's needs 4. Grant appropriate permissions to staff members 5. Your server is now protected! ## 💡 Why Choose This Solution? Unlike basic verification systems that rely on simple chat commands or external services, this comprehensive approach provides multiple layers of protection. The innovative void-based isolation ensures complete security while the visual captcha system offers an engaging user experience that legitimate players can easily complete. The extensive configuration options mean you can fine-tune every aspect of the verification process to match your server's unique requirements. Whether you need strict security for a competitive environment or a more relaxed approach for a community server, this system adapts to your needs. **Transform your server security today** - join thousands of server owners who trust this solution to keep their communities safe while welcoming genuine players with open arms.
